v.CNV: 拿玛人琐法回答说：
v.ESV: Then Zophar the Naamathite answered and said:
v.GAE: 나아마 사람 소발이 대답하여 이르되
v.KJV: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said,
v.NASB: Then Zophar the Naamathite answered,
v.NIV: Then Zophar the Naamathite replied:
v.NRSV: Then Zophar the Naamathite answered:
v.SAENEW: 나아마 사람 소발이 대답하였다.
v.WLB: 그러자 나아마 사람 소발이 대꾸했습니다.

v.CNV: “我的心思烦扰叫我回话，因为我内心急躁。
v.ESV: “Therefore my thoughts answer me, because of my haste within me.
v.GAE: 그러므로 내 초조한 마음이 나로 하여금 대답하게 하나니 이는 내 중심이 조급함이니라
v.KJV: Therefore do my thoughts cause me to answer, and for this I make haste.
v.NASB: 'Therefore my disquieting thoughts make me respond, Even because of my inward agitation.
v.NIV: “My troubled thoughts prompt me to answer because I am greatly disturbed.
v.NRSV: “Pay attention! My thoughts urge me to answer, because of the agitation within me.
v.SAENEW: 입을 다물고 있으려 했으나, 네 말을 듣고 있자니 화가 나서 참을 수가 없다.
v.WLB: “어쩔 수 없이 내 생각을 토로해야겠군. 참 답답하다.

v.CNV: 我听见了那羞辱我的责备，心灵因着我的悟性回答我。
v.ESV: I hear censure that insults me, and out of my understanding a spirit answers me.
v.GAE: 내가 나를 부끄럽게 하는 책망을 들었으므로 나의 슬기로운 마음이 나로 하여금 대답하게 하는구나
v.KJV: I have heard the check of my reproach, and the spirit of my understanding causeth me to answer.
v.NASB: 'I listened to the reproof which insults me, And the spirit of my understanding makes me answer.
v.NIV: I hear a rebuke that dishonors me, and my understanding inspires me to reply.
v.NRSV: I hear censure that insults me, and a spirit beyond my understanding answers me.
v.SAENEW: 네가 하는 말을 듣고 있자니 모두 나를 모욕하는 말이다. 그러나 깨닫게 하는 영이 내게 대답할 말을 일러주었다.
v.WLB: 나를 모욕하고 훈계하는 말을 듣고는 내 영이 깨닫는 바가 있어 대답할 수밖에 없구나.

v.CNV: 你不知亘古以来，自从地上有人以来，
v.ESV: Do you not know this from of old, since man was placed on earth,
v.GAE: 네가 알지 못하느냐 예로부터 사람이 이 세상에 생긴 때로부터
v.KJV: Knowest thou not this of old, since man was placed upon earth,
v.NASB: 'Do you know this from of old, From the establishment of man on earth,
v.NIV: “Surely you know how it has been from of old, ever since mankind was placed on the earth,
v.NRSV: Do you not know this from of old, ever since mortals were placed on earth,
v.SAENEW: 너도 이런 것쯤은 알고 있을 것이다. 이 땅에 사람이 생기기 시작한 그 옛날로부터,
v.WLB: 자네는 옛날부터 내려온 이 일을 알지 못하는가? 사람이 이 땅에 살게 되면서부터

v.CNV: 恶人的欢呼并不长久，不敬虔者的快乐，不过是暂时的吗？
v.ESV: that the exulting of the wicked is short, and the joy of the godless but for a moment?
v.GAE: 악인이 이긴다는 자랑도 잠시요 경건하지 못한 자의 즐거움도 잠깐이니라
v.KJV: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the hypocrite but for a moment?
v.NASB: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, And the joy of the godless momentary?
v.NIV: that the mirth of the wicked is brief, the joy of the godless lasts but a moment.
v.NRSV: that the exulting of the wicked is short, and the joy of the godless is but for a moment?
v.SAENEW: 악한 자의 승전가는 언제나 잠깐뿐이었으며, 경건하지 못한 자의 기쁨도 순간일 뿐이었다.
v.WLB: 악인의 승리는 짧고 위선자의 기쁨은 순간이라는 것 말일세.

v.CNV: 虽然他的高贵上达于天，他的头直插云霄，
v.ESV: Though his height mount up to the heavens, and his head reach to the clouds,
v.GAE: 그 존귀함이 하늘에 닿고 그 머리가 구름에 미칠지라도
v.KJV: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds;
v.NASB: 'Though his loftiness reaches the heavens, And his head touches the clouds,
v.NIV: Though the pride of the godless person reaches to the heavens and his head touches the clouds,
v.NRSV: Even though they mount up high as the heavens, and their head reaches to the clouds,
v.SAENEW: 교만이 하늘 높은 줄 모르고, 머리가 구름에 닿는 것 같아도,
v.WLB: 그 뛰어남이 하늘을 찌르고 그 머리가 구름에 닿는다 해도

v.CNV: 他必永远灭亡像自己的粪一般，素来看见他的，都要说：‘他在哪里呢？’
v.ESV: he will perish forever like his own dung; those who have seen him will say, ‘Where is he?’
v.GAE: 자기의 똥처럼 영원히 망할 것이라 그를 본 자가 이르기를 그가 어디 있느냐 하리라
v.KJV: Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung: they which have seen him shall say, Where is he?
v.NASB: He perishes forever like his refuse; Those who have seen him will say, 'Where is he?'
v.NIV: he will perish forever, like his own dung; those who have seen him will say, ‘Where is he?’
v.NRSV: they will perish forever like their own dung; those who have seen them will say, ‘Where are they?’
v.SAENEW: 마침내 그도 분토처럼 사라지고 말며, 그를 본 적이 있는 사람도 그 교만한 자가 왜 안 보이느냐고 물으리라는 것쯤은, 너도 알고 있을 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 자기 똥처럼 영원히 스러지는 법일세. 그를 본 사람들이 ‘그가 어디 있느냐?’ 할 걸세.

v.CNV: 他必如梦一般飞逝，人再也找不着他，他必被赶去如夜间的异象，
v.ESV: He will fly away like a dream and not be found; he will be chased away like a vision of the night.
v.GAE: 그는 꿈 같이 지나가니 다시 찾을 수 없을 것이요 밤에 보이는 환상처럼 사라지리라
v.KJV: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found: yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.
v.NASB: 'He flies away like a dream, and they cannot find him; Even like a vision of the night he is chased away.
v.NIV: Like a dream he flies away, no more to be found, banished like a vision of the night.
v.NRSV: They will fly away like a dream, and not be found; they will be chased away like a vision of the night.
v.SAENEW: 꿈같이 잊혀져 다시는 흔적을 찾을 수 없게 되며, 마치 밤에 본 환상처럼 사라질 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 꿈처럼 날아가 버려 더 이상 찾을 수가 없을 것이며 정녕 밤에 보는 환상처럼 사라져 버릴 걸세.

v.CNV: 亲眼见过他的，必不再见他，他的本处也必看不见他。
v.ESV: The eye that saw him will see him no more, nor will his place any more behold him.
v.GAE: 그를 본 눈이 다시 그를 보지 못할 것이요 그의 처소도 다시 그를 보지 못할 것이며
v.KJV: The eye also which saw him shall see him no more; neither shall his place any more behold him.
v.NASB: 'The eye which saw him sees him no longer, And his place no longer beholds him.
v.NIV: The eye that saw him will not see him again; his place will look on him no more.
v.NRSV: The eye that saw them will see them no more, nor will their place behold them any longer.
v.SAENEW: 그를 본 적이 있는 사람도 다시는 그를 볼 수 없으며, 그가 살던 곳에서도 다시는 그를 볼 수 없을 것이다.
v.WLB: 그를 본 눈이 다시는 그를 못 볼 것이고 그가 살던 곳도 다시는 그를 보지 못할 걸세.

v.CNV: 他的儿女必向穷人求恩，他们的手要退还他不义之财，
v.ESV: His children will seek the favor of the poor, and his hands will give back his wealth.
v.GAE: 그의 아들들은 가난한 자에게 은혜를 구하겠고 그도 얻은 재물을 자기 손으로 도로 줄 것이며
v.KJV: His children shall seek to please the poor, and his hands shall restore their goods.
v.NASB: 'His sons favor the poor, And his hands give back his wealth.
v.NIV: His children must make amends to the poor; his own hands must give back his wealth.
v.NRSV: Their children will seek the favor of the poor, and their hands will give back their wealth.
v.SAENEW: 그 자녀들이 가난한 사람에게 용서를 구할 것이며, 착취한 재물을 가난한 사람에게 배상하게 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 그 자손은 가난한 사람에게 은혜를 구하겠고 가난한 사람의 손이 그들의 재물을 되찾을 걸세.

v.CNV: 他的骨头虽然充满青春活力，却必与他一同躺卧在尘土中。
v.ESV: His bones are full of his youthful vigor, but it will lie down with him in the dust.
v.GAE: 그의 기골이 청년 같이 강장하나 그 기세가 그와 함께 흙에 누우리라
v.KJV: His bones are full of the sin of his youth, which shall lie down with him in the dust.
v.NASB: 'His bones are full of his youthful vigor, But it lies down with him in the dust.
v.NIV: The youthful vigor that fills his bones will lie with him in the dust.
v.NRSV: Their bodies, once full of youth, will lie down in the dust with them.
v.SAENEW: 그의 몸에 한때는 젊음이 넘쳤어도, 그 젊음은 역시 그와 함께 먼지 속에 눕게 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 그 뼈는 젊은 기운으로 가득 찼었지만 그 기운도 그와 함께 흙먼지 속에 누울 걸세.

v.CNV: 邪恶在他的口中虽然甘甜，他把邪恶藏在自己的舌下。
v.ESV: “Though evil is sweet in his mouth, though he hides it under his tongue,
v.GAE: 그는 비록 악을 달게 여겨 혀 밑에 감추며
v.KJV: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue;
v.NASB: 'Though evil is sweet in his mouth And he hides it under his tongue,
v.NIV: “Though evil is sweet in his mouth and he hides it under his tongue,
v.NRSV: “Though wickedness is sweet in their mouth, though they hide it under their tongues,
v.SAENEW: 그가 혀로 악을 맛보니, 맛이 좋았다.
v.WLB: 악이 그 입에 닿아 그가 그것을 혀 밑에 숨기더라도

v.CNV: 他虽然爱惜不舍，含在口中，
v.ESV: though he is loath to let it go and holds it in his mouth,
v.GAE: 아껴서 버리지 아니하고 입천장에 물고 있을지라도
v.KJV: Though he spare it, and forsake it not; but keep it still within his mouth:
v.NASB: Though he desires it and will not let it go, But holds it in his mouth,
v.NIV: though he cannot bear to let it go and lets it linger in his mouth,
v.NRSV: though they are loath to let it go, and hold it in their mouths,
v.SAENEW: 그래서 그는 악을 혀 밑에 넣고, 그 달콤한 맛을 즐겼다.
v.WLB: 그가 그것을 아끼고 아껴서 버리지 못하고 입속에 물고 있더라도

v.CNV: 然而他的食物在他腹中却要变坏，在他里面成为眼镜蛇的毒汁。
v.ESV: yet his food is turned in his stomach; it is the venom of cobras within him.
v.GAE: 그의 음식이 창자 속에서 변하며 뱃속에서 독사의 쓸개가 되느니라
v.KJV: Yet his meat in his bowels is turned, it is the gall of asps within him.
v.NASB: Yet his food in his stomach is changed To the venom of cobras within him.
v.NIV: yet his food will turn sour in his stomach; it will become the venom of serpents within him.
v.NRSV: yet their food is turned in their stomachs; it is the venom of asps within them.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 그것이 뱃속으로 내려가서는 쓴맛으로 변해 버렸다. 그것이 그의 몸 속에서 독사의 독이 되어 버렸다.
v.WLB: 그가 먹은 것은 뱃속에서 변해 그 안에서 독사의 독이 돼 버릴 걸세.

v.CNV: 他吞下了财宝，还要把它吐出来，　神要从他的腹中把它掏出来，
v.ESV: He swallows down riches and vomits them up again; God casts them out of his belly.
v.GAE: 그가 재물을 삼켰을지라도 토할 것은 하나님이 그의 배에서 도로 나오게 하심이니
v.KJV: He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again: God shall cast them out of his belly.
v.NASB: 'He swallows riches, But will vomit them up; God will expel them from his belly.
v.NIV: He will spit out the riches he swallowed; God will make his stomach vomit them up.
v.NRSV: They swallow down riches and vomit them up again; God casts them out of their bellies.
v.SAENEW: 그 악한 자는 꿀꺽 삼킨 재물을 다 토해 냈다. 하나님은 이렇게 그 재물을 그 악한 자의 입에서 꺼내어서 빼앗긴 사람들에게 되돌려 주신다.
v.WLB: 그는 자기가 삼킨 재물을 뱉어 낼 걸세. 하나님께서 그것들을 그 뱃속에서 토해 내게 하실 걸세.

v.CNV: 他必吸吮眼镜蛇的毒液，腹蛇的舌头必把他杀死。
v.ESV: He will suck the poison of cobras; the tongue of a viper will kill him.
v.GAE: 그는 독사의 독을 빨며 뱀의 혀에 죽을 것이라
v.KJV: He shall suck the poison of asps: the viper’s tongue shall slay him.
v.NASB: 'He sucks the poison of cobras; The viper's tongue slays him.
v.NIV: He will suck the poison of serpents; the fangs of an adder will kill him.
v.NRSV: They will suck the poison of asps; the tongue of a viper will kill them.
v.SAENEW: 악한 자가 삼킨 것은 독과도 같은 것, 독사에 물려 죽듯이 그 독으로 죽는다.
v.WLB: 그가 뱀의 독을 빨고 독사의 혀가 그를 죽일 걸세.

v.CNV: 他必不得看见江河，就是流蜜与奶的江河。
v.ESV: He will not look upon the rivers, the streams flowing with honey and curds.
v.GAE: 그는 강 곧 꿀과 엉긴 젖이 흐르는 강을 보지 못할 것이요
v.KJV: He shall not see the rivers, the floods, the brooks of honey and butter.
v.NASB: 'He does not look at the streams, The rivers flowing with honey and curds.
v.NIV: He will not enjoy the streams, the rivers flowing with honey and cream.
v.NRSV: They will not look on the rivers, the streams flowing with honey and curds.
v.SAENEW: 올리브 기름이 강물처럼 흐르는 것을 그는 못 볼 것이다. 젖과 꿀이 흐르는 것도 못 볼 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 흐르는 시내, 꿀과 젖이 흐르는 시내를 보지 못할 걸세.

v.CNV: 他劳苦所得的必归别人，自己却不得吃用；他交易得来的财利，自己却不得享用。
v.ESV: He will give back the fruit of his toil and will not swallow it down; from the profit of his trading he will get no enjoyment.
v.GAE: 수고하여 얻은 것을 삼키지 못하고 돌려 주며 매매하여 얻은 재물로 즐거움을 삼지 못하리니
v.KJV: That which he laboured for shall he restore, and shall not swallow it down: according to his substance shall the restitution be, and he shall not rejoice therein.
v.NASB: 'He returns what he has attained And cannot swallow it; As to the riches of his trading, He cannot even enjoy them.
v.NIV: What he toiled for he must give back uneaten; he will not enjoy the profit from his trading.
v.NRSV: They will give back the fruit of their toil, and will not swallow it down; from the profit of their trading they will get no enjoyment.
v.SAENEW: 그는 수고하여 얻은 것을 마음대로 먹지도 못하고 되돌려보내며, 장사해서 얻은 재물을 마음대로 누리지도 못할 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 그토록 애를 써도 자기는 먹지 못하고 돌려주어야 하고 자기가 장사해서 얻은 이익을 누리지 못할 걸세.

v.CNV: 因为他欺压穷人，不顾他们，强抢不是自己建造的房屋。
v.ESV: For he has crushed and abandoned the poor; he has seized a house that he did not build.
v.GAE: 이는 그가 가난한 자를 학대하고 버렸음이요 자기가 세우지 않은 집을 빼앗음이니라
v.KJV: Because he hath oppressed and hath forsaken the poor; because he hath violently taken away an house which he builded not;
v.NASB: 'For he has oppressed and forsaken the poor; He has seized a house which he has not built.
v.NIV: For he has oppressed the poor and left them destitute; he has seized houses he did not build.
v.NRSV: For they have crushed and abandoned the poor, they have seized a house that they did not build.
v.SAENEW: 이것은, 그가 가난한 이들을 억압하고 돌보지 않았기 때문이며, 자기가 세우지도 않은 남의 집을 강제로 빼앗았기 때문이다.
v.WLB: 그가 가난한 사람들을 억압하고 내버려 두었으며 자기가 짓지도 않은 집을 강제로 빼앗았기 때문일세.

v.CNV: 因为他内心没有安宁，他不能保存他喜爱的东西。
v.ESV: “Because he knew no contentment in his belly, he will not let anything in which he delights escape him.
v.GAE: 그는 마음에 평안을 알지 못하니 그가 기뻐하는 것을 하나도 보존하지 못하겠고
v.KJV: Surely he shall not feel quietness in his belly, he shall not save of that which he desired.
v.NASB: 'Because he knew no quiet within him, He does not retain anything he desires.
v.NIV: “Surely he will have no respite from his craving; he cannot save himself by his treasure.
v.NRSV: “They knew no quiet in their bellies; in their greed they let nothing escape.
v.SAENEW: 그는 아무리 가져도 만족하지 못한다. 탐욕에 얽매여 벗어나지를 못한다.
v.WLB: 그 뱃속이 편안할 날이 없을 것이고 그가 원하는 어떤 것도 갖지 못할 걸세.

v.CNV: 他吃得一无所剩，所以他的福乐不能持久；
v.ESV: There was nothing left after he had eaten; therefore his prosperity will not endure.
v.GAE: 남기는 것이 없이 모두 먹으니 그런즉 그 행복이 오래 가지 못할 것이라
v.KJV: There shall none of his meat be left; therefore shall no man look for his goods.
v.NASB: 'Nothing remains for him to devour, Therefore his prosperity does not endure.
v.NIV: Nothing is left for him to devour; his prosperity will not endure.
v.NRSV: There was nothing left after they had eaten; therefore their prosperity will not endure.
v.SAENEW: 먹을 때에는 남기는 것 없이 모조리 먹어 치우지만, 그의 번영은 오래 가지 못한다.
v.WLB: 그가 삼킬 만한 것이 아무것도 남지 않고 그리하여 그가 잘되는 것을 누구도 볼 수 없을 걸세.

v.CNV: 他在满足有余的时候，陷入困境，受过苦的人的手都临到他身上。
v.ESV: In the fullness of his sufficiency he will be in distress; the hand of everyone in misery will come against him.
v.GAE: 풍족할 때에도 괴로움이 이르리니 모든 재난을 주는 자의 손이 그에게 임하리라
v.KJV: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits: every hand of the wicked shall come upon him.
v.NASB: 'In the fullness of his plenty he will be cramped; The hand of everyone who suffers will come against him.
v.NIV: In the midst of his plenty, distress will overtake him; the full force of misery will come upon him.
v.NRSV: In full sufficiency they will be in distress; all the force of misery will come upon them.
v.SAENEW: 성공하여 하늘 끝까지 이를 때에, 그가 재앙을 만나고, 온갖 불운이 그에게 밀어닥칠 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 많기는 많은데 모자라고 악한 사람의 모든 손이 그를 덮칠 걸세.

v.CNV: 他正在填饱肚腹的时候，　神就把猛烈的怒气降在他身上，他正在吃饭的时候，　神要把这怒气如雨降在他身上。
v.ESV: To fill his belly to the full, God will send his burning anger against him and rain it upon him into his body.
v.GAE: 그가 배를 불리려 할 때에 하나님이 맹렬한 진노를 내리시리니 음식을 먹을 때에 그의 위에 비 같이 쏟으시리라
v.KJV: When he is about to fill his belly, God shall cast the fury of his wrath upon him, and shall rain it upon him while he is eating.
v.NASB: 'When he fills his belly, God will send His fierce anger on him And will rain it on him while he is eating.
v.NIV: When he has filled his belly, God will vent his burning anger against him and rain down his blows on him.
v.NRSV: To fill their belly to the full God will send his fierce anger into them, and rain it upon them as their food.
v.SAENEW: 그가 먹고 싶은 대로 먹게 놓아 두어라. 하나님이 그에게 맹렬한 진노를 퍼부으시며, 분노를 비처럼 쏟으실 것이다.
v.WLB: 그가 자기 배를 채우려 할 때 하나님께서는 그를 향해 타오르는 진노를 쏟으시고 그가 먹고 있는 가운데 비같이 퍼부으실 걸세.

v.CNV: 他要逃避铁制的兵器，但铜弓的箭必把他射穿；
v.ESV: He will flee from an iron weapon; a bronze arrow will strike him through.
v.GAE: 그가 철 병기를 피할 때에는 놋화살을 쏘아 꿰뚫을 것이요
v.KJV: He shall flee from the iron weapon, and the bow of steel shall strike him through.
v.NASB: 'He may flee from the iron weapon, But the bronze bow will pierce him.
v.NIV: Though he flees from an iron weapon, a bronze-tipped arrow pierces him.
v.NRSV: They will flee from an iron weapon; a bronze arrow will strike them through.
v.SAENEW: 그가 철 무기를 피하려 해도, 놋화살이 그를 꿰뚫을 것이다.
v.WLB: 그가 철 무기를 피해 도망치겠으나 강철로 된 활이 그를 관통할 걸세.

v.CNV: 他把箭一抽，箭就从背后出来，发亮的箭头从他的胆中出来，死亡的惊恐临到他身上。
v.ESV: It is drawn forth and comes out of his body; the glittering point comes out of his gallbladder; terrors come upon him.
v.GAE: 몸에서 그의 화살을 빼낸즉 번쩍번쩍하는 촉이 그의 쓸개에서 나오고 큰 두려움이 그에게 닥치느니라
v.KJV: It is drawn, and cometh out of the body; yea, the glittering sword cometh out of his gall: terrors are upon him.
v.NASB: 'It is drawn forth and comes out of his back, Even the glittering point from his gall. Terrors come upon him,
v.NIV: He pulls it out of his back, the gleaming point out of his liver. Terrors will come over him;
v.NRSV: It is drawn forth and comes out of their body, and the glittering point comes out of their gall; terrors come upon them.
v.SAENEW: 등을 뚫고 나온 화살을 빼낸다 하여도, 쓸개를 휘젓고 나온 번쩍이는 활촉이 그를 겁에 질리게 할 것이다.
v.WLB: 그가 몸에서 그 화살을 빼내면 번쩍거리는 화살촉이 그 쓸개에서 나올 것이고 그리하여 공포가 그를 덮칠 걸세.

v.CNV: 万般黑暗为他的财宝留存，不是由人吹着的火要吞灭他，要毁掉他帐棚中所剩下的。
v.ESV: Utter darkness is laid up for his treasures; a fire not fanned will devour him; what is left in his tent will be consumed.
v.GAE: 큰 어둠이 그를 위하여 예비되어 있고 사람이 피우지 않은 불이 그를 멸하며 그 장막에 남은 것을 해치리라
v.KJV: All darkness shall be hid in his secret places: a fire not blown shall consume him; it shall go ill with him that is left in his tabernacle.
v.NASB: Complete darkness is held in reserve for his treasures, And unfanned fire will devour him; It will consume the survivor in his tent.
v.NIV: total darkness lies in wait for his treasures. A fire unfanned will consume him and devour what is left in his tent.
v.NRSV: Utter darkness is laid up for their treasures; a fire fanned by no one will devour them; what is left in their tent will be consumed.
v.SAENEW: 그가 간직한 평생 모은 모든 재산이 삽시간에 없어지고, 풀무질을 하지 않아도 저절로 타오르는 불길이 그를 삼킬 것이며, 그 불이 집에 남아 있는 사람들까지 사를 것이다.
v.WLB: 그의 비밀스러운 곳에 모든 어둠이 드리우고 피우지도 않은 불이 그를 태워 버리며 그 장막에 남은 것을 삼켜 버릴 걸세.

v.CNV: 天必显露他的罪孽，地要兴起来攻击他，
v.ESV: The heavens will reveal his iniquity, and the earth will rise up against him.
v.GAE: 하늘이 그의 죄악을 드러낼 것이요 땅이 그를 대항하여 일어날 것인즉
v.KJV: The heaven shall reveal his iniquity; and the earth shall rise up against him.
v.NASB: 'The heavens will reveal his iniquity, And the earth will rise up against him.
v.NIV: The heavens will expose his guilt; the earth will rise up against him.
v.NRSV: The heavens will reveal their iniquity, and the earth will rise up against them.
v.SAENEW: 하늘이 그의 죄악을 밝히 드러내며, 땅이 그를 고발할 것이다.
v.WLB: 하늘이 그의 죄를 드러내고 땅이 그를 대적해 들고 일어날 걸세.

v.CNV: 他的家产必被掠去，在　神忿怒的日子被冲走。
v.ESV: The possessions of his house will be carried away, dragged off in the day of God's wrath.
v.GAE: 그의 가산이 떠나가며 하나님의 진노의 날에 끌려가리라
v.KJV: The increase of his house shall depart, and his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.
v.NASB: 'The increase of his house will depart; His possessions will flow away in the day of His anger.
v.NIV: A flood will carry off his house, rushing waters on the day of God’s wrath.
v.NRSV: The possessions of their house will be carried away, dragged off in the day of God’s wrath.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 진노하시는 날에, 그 집의 모든 재산이 홍수에 쓸려가듯 다 쓸려갈 것이다.
v.WLB: 그 집이 융성해지기를 그치고 그분의 진노의 날에 그 재물들이 떠내려갈 걸세.

v.CNV: 这是恶人从　神所得的分，是　神给他指定的产业。”
v.ESV: This is the wicked man's portion from God, the heritage decreed for him by God.”
v.GAE: 이는 악인이 하나님께 받을 분깃이요 하나님이 그에게 정하신 기업이니라
v.KJV: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, and the heritage appointed unto him by God.
v.NASB: 'This is the wicked man's portion from God, Even the heritage decreed to him by God.'
v.NIV: Such is the fate God allots the wicked, the heritage appointed for them by God.”
v.NRSV: This is the portion of the wicked from God, the heritage decreed for them by God.”
v.SAENEW: 이것이, 악한 사람이 하나님께 받을 몫이며, 하나님이 그의 것으로 정해 주신 유산이 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 이러한 것이 하나님께서 악인에게 주신 몫이요, 하나님께서 그들에게 정하신 유업일세.”
